notes: vite-env.d.ts: triple-slash reference only; no executable lines.
prompts/index.ts, batch/index.ts, AtlsPanel/types.ts, uhppTypes.ts: type-only / re-export barrels with 0 instrumentable lines in Vitest v8.
batch/types.ts: large schema of type aliases only; no runtime code.
uhppCanonical.ts: type-only / constants if present without executable lines in coverage.
App.tsx: excluded from Vitest coverage include (vite.config.ts); validated with Playwright E2E. Raise unit coverage only when extracting testable hooks from the shell.
main.tsx: keep in coverage; thin entry.
__test_tool_probe.ts / _test_tool_probe.ts: ad-hoc probes, not part of CI tests.
scripts/fetch-models.ts is outside src/ and not part of Vitest coverage include; listed under test-gap-reports/scripts-out-of-scope.txt instead of gap lists.
Do not add broad pathPrefixes to hide low coverage; add explicit paths with a one-line rationale only.
vite.config.ts `coverage.exclude` must stay in sync with type-only / E2E-first entries above so CI thresholds measure executable app code, not barrels or App shell.
main.rs: binary entry; only covered by integration/e2e.
